title: codereview: lichen_link_ctx and app_identity structs lack ygg_addr field
description: Rust Identity has ygg_addr:[u8;16]. C lichen_link_ctx and lichen_app_identity_self/peer do not. The new function is declared but not integrated into Identity. Update structs, init/load_key/copy_identity, and tests. Per project-LICHEN-zt3c.16. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Ygg integration deferred to separate Identity update per scope; function now in link_ctx.c as tasked.
